# Push application id and type in LSQ

: Ranjan kumar Singh
Created time: August 28, 2024 2:54 PM
Status: In progress
Last edited: February 19, 2026 7:12 PM
Owner: Lalit Bihani

# **What problem are we solving?**

- Currently we do not push loan application ID against the opportunity and because of this data team are not able to perform recon of LSQ data with Volt DB

---

# **How do we measure success?**

---

# **How are others solving this problem?**

---

# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements overview

1. We need to push loan application id for the fresh loan, line enhancement application against the opportunity.
2. We need to push loan application type for the fresh loan, line enhancement application against the opportunity.

## User stories / User flow

1. When we create opportunity on LSQ for the fresh loan application when user fetch limit from CAMS and KFIN then while creating the opportunity push loan application id and application type field.
2. When user fetch MFC, we create opportunity but loan application id is not created at this point of time. in this case we need to update the opportunity at CAMS/KFIN fetch step and push application type and application id against the opportunity.
3. When user increases the limit, we already push application type as increase limit. we just need to send the loan application id for increase limit opportunity.

## Requirements

Opportunity schema details

| Opportunity attributes | Schema code | Data type | Expected data |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Latest Loan Application Id | mx_Custom_49 | String | loan application Id as per DB |
| Current Application Type | mx_Custom_25 | String | For new application: New loan application
For increase limit: Increase limit |
